name: FluxzeroErrorCode
documentation:
Stable identifiers for Fluxzero SDK errors.

The textual message may evolve to become more helpful, but the code should remain stable so application logs, support playbooks, and Fluxzero documentation can refer to the same problem over time.

Published codes are part of the SDK support contract: do not renumber, rename, or reuse them for a different meaning. Add a new code when introducing a distinct error category.

fields.name: DOCUMENTATION_BASE_URL
fields.documentation: Default documentation root for SDK error pages.

methods.name: getCode
methods.documentation: Returns the stable machine-readable error code.

methods.name: getDocumentationUrl
methods.documentation: Returns the canonical documentation URL for this error.

enumConstants.name: FLUXZERO_INSTANCE_MISSING
enumConstants.documentation: No {@link io.fluxzero.sdk.Fluxzero} instance is available for the current call.

enumConstants.name: HANDLER_INVOCATION_FAILED
enumConstants.documentation: A handler failed while processing a message.

enumConstants.name: MESSAGE_DISPATCH_FAILED
enumConstants.documentation: One or more messages could not be dispatched.

enumConstants.name: PERIODIC_SCHEDULE_INVALID
enumConstants.documentation: A periodic schedule annotation is missing the required timing configuration.

enumConstants.name: REQUEST_TIMED_OUT
enumConstants.documentation: A request was sent, but no matching response arrived before the timeout elapsed.

enumConstants.name: RESPONSE_DISPATCH_FAILED
enumConstants.documentation: A response could not be published back to the requester.

enumConstants.name: THREAD_INTERRUPTED
enumConstants.documentation: A blocking wait was interrupted before Fluxzero could complete it.

enumConstants.name: TRACKING_CONFIGURATION_INVALID
enumConstants.documentation: Tracking could not start because consumer configuration is incomplete or conflicting.

enumConstants.name: TRACKING_RUNTIME_FAILED
enumConstants.documentation: Tracking failed while storing position or managing tracker state.

enumConstants.name: USER_PROVIDER_MISSING
enumConstants.documentation: A user was attached to a message without a configured user provider.
